self_conditional_modifiers_json.description: Golden Blood-Tide (R1): when current HP increases or decreases, Normal Attack DMG +16%, Charged Attack DMG +14%, and Stellar-Conduct DMG +14% for 4s; stacks up to 3 times (retriggerable every 0.3s). Modeled at max 3 stacks. The ATK SPD +8% at 3 stacks is not modeled (no eval-time key).
